list.emptyHint: Click 'New Project' or 'Import ZIP' in the top-right corner to get started

importConflict.title: Duplicate project ID detected
importConflict.description: The project ID intended for import
importConflict.descriptionSuffix: already exists. You can overwrite the existing project or auto-rename the imported one.
importConflict.overwriteDesc: Replace existing project data with the contents of the import package
importConflict.renameDesc: Keep the existing project; the imported project will receive a new internal ID

importDiagnostics.title: Import Diagnostics
importDiagnostics.description: Pre-import checks completed. Issues are grouped by severity; blocking issues must be resolved before import can continue.

createModal.title: New Project
createModal.titleHint: An internal project ID will be auto-generated for URLs and file storage
createModal.styleRefHint: Style features will be automatically analysed to generate consistent visuals
createModal.styleImageUploadFailed: Style reference image upload failed; you can re-upload later in project settings

openClaw.title: OpenClaw Integration Guide
openClaw.subtitle: Connect ArcReel to OpenClaw AI Agent
openClaw.systemPrompt: Learn {{skillUrl}} then follow the skill to understand how to create videos with ArcReel
openClaw.step01Title: Send the prompt above to your OpenClaw
openClaw.step01Desc: Copy the prompt and paste it to OpenClaw
openClaw.step02Title: OpenClaw learns capabilities from the Skill document
openClaw.step02Desc: OpenClaw will automatically read the ArcReel Skill document to learn all available tools and API usage
openClaw.step03Title: OpenClaw interacts with ArcReel to create videos
openClaw.step03Desc: Describe your creative needs and OpenClaw will call ArcReel to handle project management, script generation, and video creation
